properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2 v5

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Justice demanded satisfaction The law had been broken again and again Judgment required immediate action Death wanted payment for sin

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Mercy refused and love took my place There on the cross where justice met grace Mercy refused to let me die Jesus the Lamb was crucified Though rightfully death wanted me Mercy refused

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Christ has become my righteousness The Lord is my peace and my freedom from sin Now I am clothed in His holiness To a new life I entered in when

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: As high as the heavens are over the earth So great is His mercy to us (His mercy endure) As far as the east is from the west That's show far He's removed our transgressions From us

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: He could have called 10 thousand angels. But Jesus took my place Mercy refused….
